creator: rainbow@irh.it
text:
Created attachment 166671
net-im_farstream010.shar

this port enable audio/video on gajim 0.1-.
Tested with FreeBSD-STABLE(amd64) and gajim 0.16.5.

just some notes:
- unfortunately FreeBSD doesn't have slots (right?) so the only solution that I found was to create a new port.
- as I need the last version of the branch 0.1 and no package is available I used git and the do-fetch: trick (found on others ports).
- seems to work fine with farstream-0.2 installed (used by pidgin for example)

any suggestions are welcome :)
